summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of OutPace Intelligence Preview page and Export functionality. Fixed critical ChatAssistant rendering issue. Most features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Chat bubble is visible but panel does not open when clicked. onClick handler not triggering state change.
ui_bugs.steps_taken: Added ChatAssistant to TenantPreview.js (was missing), increased z-index to 9999, tested with force clicks
ui_bugs.current_status: Chat bubble renders and is visible, but clicking it does not open the chat panel

ui_bugs.issue: Z-index overlay issue - 'Made with Emergent' badge blocks normal clicks
ui_bugs.workaround: Increased z-index to 9999, but onClick still not working

passed_tests: Preview page loads correctly with tenant data
Both Opportunities (10) and Intelligence (8) tabs are visible and functional
Tab navigation works - can switch between Opportunities and Intelligence
All 8 Perplexity intelligence reports display correctly
AI summaries are clean sentences (NOT JSON format)
Export button is present and enabled
Export modal shows both Opportunities and Intelligence tabs
Export PDF button is present in modal
Export Excel button is present in modal
Select All functionality works (10 items selected)
Modal closes properly with ESC key
Chat assistant bubble is visible (after fix)
Opportunity cards show score, agency, description
Intelligence cards show title, type, content, sources
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix ChatAssistant onClick handler - the chat bubble is now visible on the preview page but clicking it does not open the chat panel. The React state (isOpen) is not updating when the button is clicked. This may be due to: (1) Component re-rendering issues, (2) Event handler not properly bound, (3) State management problem. The component was successfully added to TenantPreview.js and z-index was increased to 9999, but the core onClick functionality is not working.
